chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 348 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 30-03-2022 Mr. Shabbir Ali Bozdar, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Mehboob Ali Wassan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh along with Abdul Rasheed Janwari, Deputy Director (HR), College Education, Sukkur..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Pursuant to last order dated 22-02-2022, statement has been filed by learned AAG along with order dated 18-03-2022, whereby the Finance Department of Government of Sindh has released funds in respect of Financial Assistance to the families of Government Servants who expired during service. Petitioner’s name is also mentioned in the list, who has been sanctioned Rs.2.4 Million. Representative of Education Department, Sukkur is in attendance and submits that the case of the Petitioner would be processed within thirty days. In view of such position, the Petition is disposed of; whereas, compliance report be filed by the Regional Director (Colleges), Sukkur Region, Sukkur before the Additional Registrar of this Court. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
